properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

identity.description: The managed service identities assigned to this resource.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

ssoUrl.description: SSO URL for the Commvault Cloud Account

backupAdminOnCcaCreate.description: The backup administrator principal provided during CCA create. Required on create (enforced by backend), ignored on update.

multiPersonAuthorizationOnCcaCreate.description: The multi-person authorization (MPA) administrator principal provided during CCA create. Required on create (enforced by backend), ignored on update.

subscriptionId.description: Azure subscription id for the the marketplace offer is purchased from

offerDetails.description: Offer details for the marketplace that is selected by the user

publisherId.description: Publisher Id for the marketplace offer

offerId.description: Offer Id for the marketplace offer

planId.description: Plan Id for the marketplace offer

planName.description: Plan Name for the marketplace offer

termUnit.description: Plan Display Name for the marketplace offer

termId.description: Plan Display Name for the marketplace offer

id.description: The unique identifier (UUID) of the Entra entity

displayName.description: The display name of the Entra entity

entityType.description: The type of entity - user or group

principalId.description: The service principal ID of the system assigned identity. This property will only be provided for a system assigned identity.

tenantId.description: The tenant ID of the system assigned identity. This property will only be provided for a system assigned identity.

type.description: Type of managed service identity (where both SystemAssigned and UserAssigned types are allowed).

userAssignedIdentities.description: The set of user assigned identities associated with the resource. The userAssignedIdentities dictionary keys will be ARM resource ids in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{identityName}. The dictionary values can be empty objects ({}) in requests.

principalId.description: The principal ID of the assigned identity.

clientId.description: The client ID of the assigned identity.

createdBy.description: The identity that created the resource.

createdByType.description: The type of identity that created the resource.

lastModifiedBy.description: The identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedByType.description: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

lastModifiedAt.description: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

storagePlans.description: The storage plans associated with the Commvault Plan

name.description: The name of the Storage resource

copyPrecedence.description: Precedence of the Storage Plan, 1 is the highest precedence, 2 is the next highest, and so on

retentionPeriod.description: Indicates the retention period valid only if the type of retention chosen in CUSTOM

retentionTime.description: Indicates the retention timeframe valid only if the type of retention chosen in CUSTOM

backupRuleType.description: Backup Rule Type for Extended Retention

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

dataSourceType.description: The datasource type of Commvault Protection Group

plan.description: The Commvault Plan to be associated with the Protection Group

resources.description: The resources to be protected under Protection Group

numberOfProtectedItems.description: The number of ProtectedItems under the Protection Group

lastBackUpTime.description: The Commvault Protection Group backup time

backupActivityStatus.description: The backup activity status indicating if backup is enabled or not on the protection group

manual.description: The items to be protected under Protection Group

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

roles.description: The list of role assignments mapping roles to Entra entities (users and groups)

roleName.description: The name of the Commvault role

entities.description: The Entra entities (users or groups) assigned to this role

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

resourceName.description: The Name of the commvault protected item

lastBackUpTime.description: The Commvault Protected Item backup time

resourceGroup.description: The resource group of the protected item

location.description: The location of the protected item

isHiddenSaaS.description: Flag indicating if the SaaS resource is hidden

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

identity.description: The managed service identities assigned to this resource.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

id.description: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. E.g. "/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}"

type.description: The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

backupOptions.description: The backup options for the VM backup

vmGuid.description: The GUID of the VM to backup

backupLevel.description: Indicates whether to stop backup or not for the VM

jobDescription.description: The name of the backup job to be shown in Commvault

backupCopyImmediately.description: Indicates whether to run backup immediately or not for the VM

runSnapShotBackup.description: Indicates whether to run snapshot backup or not for the VM, if false, it will run regular backup

notifyUserOnJobCompletion.description: Indicates whether to notify the user on job completion

inPlaceRestore.description: Check whether inplace or out of place restore.

vmDestinationInfo.description: The vm destination details of the VM.

sourceVmGuid.description: The GUID of VM to be restored.

storageAccountId.description: The storage account to be used for restore.

powerOnVmAfterRestore.description: The identifier to check if VM needs to be powered on.

resourceGroup.description: The resource group of the VM.

networkId.description: The network Id of the VM.

subnetId.description: The subnet Id of the VM.

attachAndSwapOsDisk.description: The identifier to check if to attach and swap disk of the VM.

targetVmGuid.description: The GUID of target VM used in DISK ATTACH.

reason.description: The reason for stopping the backup

restoreTimes.description: The Commvault Protected Item Restore points
